generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about resilience. In an uncertain world, relying solely on allies leaves us vulnerable. Look at how quickly supply chains collapsed during the pandemic - imagine that with critical defense systems. We need domestic capacity to protect our interests when geopolitical winds shift. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
